offer: For medical billing specialists processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate patient data causes billing errors. We provide a patient data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate patient data leads to billing errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Share insights on Indie Hackers about billing workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Engage in community forums for billing tools discussions
try_it: Let users try manual data entry support on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common data inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing patient data
